title: elaeocarpus clethroides
intro: Elaeocarpus clethroides, also known as the Blueberry Ash or Blue Bean Tree, is a deciduous tree native to eastern Australia and New South Wales. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves and bark of the Elaeocarpus clethroides have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote overall well-being and provide relief from various health issues.
